case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BARRISH BAIL BONDS
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY BARRISH BAIL BONDS $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,083.00, NOTATION MADE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT PER CRC 522
